name: Saint Peter
summary: Cletus or Cleatus is a given name, meaning "one who has been called" or "summoned one". It may refer to:
biography:
People Religion
Pope Anacletus (died c. 92), third Bishop of Rome, also known as Cletus
Cletus Bél (died 1245), Hungarian prelate Politics
Cletus Avoka (born 1951), Ghanaian lawyer and politician
Cletus Seidu Dapilah (born 1980), Ghanaian politician
Cletus Dunn (born 1948), Canadian politician
Cletus Wotorson (1937–2024), Liberian politician and geologist Sports
Cletus Andersson (1893–1971), Swedish water polo player
Clete Blakeman (born 1964), American football official
Clete Boyer (1937–2007), American baseball player
Cletus Clark (born 1962), American retired hurdler
Cletus Paul (born 1993), Indian footballer
Cletus Seldin (born 1986), American boxer Other fields
Cletus Ibeto (born 1952), Nigerian businessman
Cletus P.
feast_es: El Vigésimo Sexto Día de Abril
summary_es: Cletus o Cleatus es un nombre propio, que significa "el que ha sido llamado" o "el convocado". Puede referirse a:
summary_pl: Cletus lub Cleatus to imię, oznaczające „ten, który został powołany” lub „wezwanego”. Może odnosić się do:
biography_es:
Personas Religión

Cletus Paul (nacido en 1993), futbolista indio
Cletus Seldin (nacido en 1986), boxeador estadounidense Otros campos
Cletus Ibeto (nacido en 1952), empresario nigeriano
Cletus P.
